scholarships.name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship (NMMS)
scholarships.description: NMMS awards scholarships to meritorious students of economically weaker sections to arrest dropout at Class 8 and encourage continuation.
scholarships.eligibility: Class 9 students, min 55% in Class 8, income below ₹1.5 LPA, govt school

scholarships.name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship (CSSS)
scholarships.description: Central Sector Scheme for top 20 percentile students of Class 12 board exams pursuing regular courses at college/university level.
scholarships.eligibility: Top 20 percentile in Class 12 board, income below ₹8 LPA, regular UG/PG course

scholarships.name: NSP Pre-Matric Scholarship for SC Students
scholarships.description: Pre-Matric Scholarship for SC students studying in Class 9 and 10. Provided to reduce dropout rates among SC students.
scholarships.eligibility: SC category students in Class 9-10, family income below ₹2.5 LPA

scholarships.name: NSP Post-Matric Scholarship for SC Students
scholarships.description: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC students pursuing higher education. One of India's largest scholarship schemes covering tuition and maintenance.
scholarships.eligibility: SC category, post-matric level, family income below ₹2.5 LPA

scholarships.name: NSP Post-Matric Scholarship for ST Students
scholarships.description: Post-Matric Scholarship for ST students to support higher education and reduce financial barriers for tribal communities.
scholarships.eligibility: ST category, post-matric level, family income below ₹2.5 LPA
scholarships.benefits: Full tuition fee + ₹23,000/year maintenance allowance + book grant

scholarships.name: Post-Matric Scholarship for Minorities
scholarships.description: Post-Matric Scholarship for students from minority communities (Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Jain, Zoroastrian) pursuing post-matric courses.
scholarships.eligibility: Minority community, post-matric level, min 50%, income below ₹2 LPA

scholarships.name: PM YASASVI Scholarship Scheme
scholarships.description: PM Young Achievers Scholarship Award Scheme for Vibrant India for OBC, EBC and DNT students. Flagship scheme replacing old OBC scholarships.
scholarships.eligibility: OBC/EBC/DNT category, Class 9 to UG level, income below ₹2.5 LPA

scholarships.name: Merit-cum-Means Scholarship for Minorities
scholarships.description: Merit-cum-Means Scholarship for minority students pursuing professional and technical courses at UG and PG level.
scholarships.eligibility: Minority community, professional/technical UG-PG, min 50%, income below ₹2.5 LPA

scholarships.name: Begum Hazrat Mahal National Scholarship
scholarships.description: Scholarship for meritorious girls from minority communities (Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Jain, Zoroastrian) studying in Class 9-12.
scholarships.eligibility: Minority community girls, Class 9-12, min 50%, income below ₹2 LPA

scholarships.name: Dr. Ambedkar Post-Matric Scholarship (EBC)
scholarships.description: Dr. Ambedkar Post-Matric Scholarship for Economically Backward Classes students to pursue higher education.
scholarships.eligibility: EBC category (non-SC/ST/OBC), post-matric, income below ₹3 LPA

scholarships.name: Pragati Scholarship for Girl Students (AICTE)
scholarships.provider: All India Council for Technical Education
scholarships.description: AICTE Pragati Scholarship to provide assistance to girl students pursuing technical education (Degree/Diploma) to advance their career.
scholarships.eligibility: Girl students in AICTE-approved technical institutions, income below ₹8 LPA

scholarships.name: INSPIRE Scholarship for Higher Education (SHE)
scholarships.description: INSPIRE-SHE scholarship for students pursuing Natural & Basic Sciences at B.Sc/M.Sc level. Aims to attract talent to science research.
scholarships.eligibility: Top 1% in Class 12 board OR top ranks in JEE/NEET, pursuing B.Sc/M.Sc Natural Sciences

scholarships.name: National Fellowship for Higher Education of ST Students
scholarships.description: Scholarship for ST students pursuing higher education in top institutions like IITs, NITs, IIMs, AIIMS etc.
scholarships.eligibility: ST category, admitted to top central institutions, income below ₹6 LPA
scholarships.benefits: ₹40,000/year + full tuition fee waiver at select institutions

scholarships.name: Ishan Uday Special Scholarship (NE Region)
scholarships.description: Special scholarship for students domiciled in North-Eastern states pursuing general degree courses in colleges/universities outside NE region.
scholarships.eligibility: NE state domicile, pursuing UG outside NE, income below ₹4.5 LPA

scholarships.name: Indira Gandhi Scholarship for Single Girl Child (UGC)
scholarships.description: UGC scholarship to promote higher education among single girl child. Recognizes the value of the girl child and promotes her education at PG level.
scholarships.eligibility: Single girl child of parents, pursuing PG course, age below 30 years

scholarships.name: Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana (KVPY)
scholarships.description: KVPY is a national fellowship to identify and encourage talented students with aptitude for research in Basic Sciences.
scholarships.eligibility: Class 11/12 or 1st year B.Sc/B.S students, min 75% in Science & Maths

scholarships.name: Disability Scholarship — NHFDC
scholarships.description: Scholarship for students with disabilities pursuing higher education. Covers tuition, maintenance and special assistance.
scholarships.eligibility: 40%+ disability certificate, pursuing higher education, income below ₹3 LPA

scholarships.name: Saksham Scholarship for Differently Abled (AICTE)
scholarships.provider: All India Council for Technical Education
scholarships.description: AICTE Saksham Scholarship for specially-abled students pursuing technical education to provide financial support and encourage inclusion.
scholarships.eligibility: 40%+ disability certificate, AICTE-approved institution, income below ₹8 LPA

scholarships.name: Maulana Azad National Fellowship (MANF)
scholarships.description: Fellowship for minority students pursuing M.Phil and Ph.D. Provides integrated five-year fellowships in sciences, humanities and social sciences.
scholarships.eligibility: Minority community, pursuing M.Phil/Ph.D, UGC-NET qualified, income below ₹6 LPA

scholarships.name: Swanath Scholarship — Orphans & Armed Forces (AICTE)
scholarships.provider: All India Council for Technical Education
scholarships.description: AICTE Swanath Scholarship for orphans, wards of armed forces/paramilitary/state police martyrs pursuing technical education.
scholarships.eligibility: Orphan or ward of armed forces martyr, AICTE-approved institution

scholarships.name: BCA Merit Scholarship
scholarships.description: Scholarship for BCA and similar undergraduate students with good academic performance.
scholarships.eligibility:
Minimum 70% marks
Family income less than 3 lakh
Must be pursuing BCA or similar course
